mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.title, e.cover, e.description, e.total_score AS totalScore, e.pass_score AS passScore, e.expire, e.question_count AS questionCount, e.collect_count AS collectCount, ROUND( (0.60 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(e.collect_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.collect_count, 0))) FROM osh_examination x WHERE x.status = 1 AND x.delete_flag = 0), 0), 0) + 0.25 * IFNULL(LN(1 + IFNULL(e.question_count, 0)) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(LN(1 + IFNULL(x.question_count, 0))) FROM osh_examination x WHERE x.status = 1 AND x.delete_flag = 0), 0), 0) + 0.15 * CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, e.create_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.0 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, e.create_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 0.85 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, e.create_time, NOW()) <= 180 THEN 0.70 ELSE 0.50 END ), 4) AS hotScore FROM osh_examination e WHERE e.status = 1 AND e.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY hotScore DESC, e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
